title: Judge Shyvana by her chosen 26.9 damage pattern
body: Patch 26.9 deliberately separates Shyvana's AD/bruiser and AP identities. AD Shyvana should be reviewed around sustained combat, autos, Q value, W sustain and stickiness. AP Shyvana should be reviewed around R and E damage windows, spacing, and weaving in and out rather than permanent melee uptime.
actionables: When reviewing Shyvana, identify AD/bruiser or AP identity before judging fights.
For AD/bruiser builds, look for whether she stayed in combat long enough to cash Q, W, and health-based durability.
For AP builds, look for whether she saved R/E windows for meaningful targets instead of drifting into low-value melee brawls.

source.title: League of Legends Patch 26.9 Notes
source.notes: Derived from the Shyvana champion changes in Patch 26.9.
